summary: Completed testing of PlayXBets betting platform for completed match filtering and responsive design. All requested features verified working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns error: 'name POLL_INTERVAL_LIVE is not defined'
Victoria match still returned as 'live' from CricketData API - this is external API data, not a backend bug. The /api/matches endpoint correctly filters it out.

integration_issues.issue: Victoria match intermittently appears on homepage when WebSocket pushes data from /api/all-matches before auto-completion detection runs. This is transient and resolves on page refresh.

action_items: Consider adding client-side filtering in WebSocket handler to filter out completed matches before merging into state
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified. Completed matches (Quetta, Victoria) are correctly filtered from /api/matches endpoint. Desktop table view shows Back (blue #1a56db) and Lay (dark red #991b1b) columns. Mobile view (375px) shows card layout with stacked team names and touch-friendly odds buttons. Match page shows all markets, Min/Max label, and correct Back/Lay colors.

homepage_desktop_completed_matches_filte.details: Quetta Gladiators and Victoria matches NOT shown on homepage - correctly filtered

homepage_desktop_table_layout.details: Table layout with Back (blue #1a56db) and Lay (dark red #991b1b) column headers

homepage_mobile_card_layout.details: Card layout visible at 375px width with stacked team names

homepage_mobile_touch_friendly_buttons.details: Mobile Back/Lay buttons with min-w-[50px] and py-2 px-3 for touch targets

homepage_hero_responsive_text.details: Hero h1 has text-3xl sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl responsive classes

match_page_all_markets.details: Match Odds, Session Markets, Over Runs Markets, Fall of Wickets, Team Total Runs, Partnership Markets, Special Markets, TIED_MATCH all visible

match_page_min_max_label.details: Min/Max label shows 'Min: 100 | Max: 2,00,000' with data-testid='min-max-label'

match_page_back_lay_colors.details: Back cells blue (#1a56db), Lay cells dark red (#991b1b)

backend_api_matches_filtering.details: /api/matches returns 32 matches, all with status 'scheduled', no completed/ended/finished matches
